title: Add zsh completion
body:
It would be awesome to tab complete the top rated entries.

Side note: All the tickets are because your tool is awesome :) 🥇

title: [Feature Request] Zoxide Library
body:
It would be awesome to integrate zoxide in other rust tools especially file managers like [joshuto](https://github.com/kamiyaa/joshuto). Would it be possible to make a zoxide library similar to the way [skim](https://github.com/lotabout/skim) is both a cli and a [library](https://github.com/lotabout/skim#use-as-a-library)? 

Linking [this issue](https://github.com/kamiyaa/joshuto/issues/97#issuecomment-944695877) for reference
